ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "key" TEXT /* Unique key for each team */,
  "number" INTEGER /* Team number */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "rookie_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was established */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the team's location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the team is located */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the team */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Social media links for the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the event took place */,
  "district_code" TEXT /* District code of the event */,
  "event_data" TEXT /* Detailed information about the event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., regional, state, national) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the event */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Organization hosting the event */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event location */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the location belongs to */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the event location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the event location */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the event */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the event location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the event location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants the location can accommodate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team performance record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the record belongs to */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the record belongs to */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the team */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team */,
  "total_distance" REAL /* Total distance traveled by the team */,
  "average_distance" REAL /* Average distance traveled by the team */,
  "performance_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance */,
  "performance_type" TEXT /* Type of performance (e.g., qualification match, elimination match) */,
  "winning_status" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the team won the match */,
  "alliance_color" TEXT /* Alliance color (e.g., red, blue) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distances" (
  "distance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distance record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the record belongs to */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the record belongs to */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance traveled by the team */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specific match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "match_number" INTEGER /* Match number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_distances_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_distances_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_add" (
  "add_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team address */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the address belongs to */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the team's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the team's location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the team is located */,
  "full_address" TEXT /* Full address of the team's location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("add_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_add_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pop_density" (
  "density_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population density record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the record belongs to */,
  "pop_density" INTEGER /* Population density of the team's location */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the population density data is for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("density_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pop_density_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the record belongs to */,
  "income" INTEGER /* Income of the team's location */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the income data is for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, team manager, analyst) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the data */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the data belongs to */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the data belongs to */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the member belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the team member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the team member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member (e.g., captain, programmer, builder) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the member joined the team */,
  "leave_date" TEXT /* Date the member left the team (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team sponsor */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the sponsor supports */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of support provided by the sponsor */,
  "sponsor_type" TEXT /* Type of sponsor (e.g., financial, material) */,
  "sponsor_since" TEXT /* Date the sponsorship began */,
  "sponsor_until" TEXT /* Date the sponsorship ends (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_sponsors_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that received the award */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was received */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the award */,
  "award_category" TEXT /* Category of the award (e.g., engineering, design) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
